name: vlm-multi-field-separation
description: VLM oracle: verify Multi-Field scene shows three distinct separated primitives

checkpoints.name: front-three-objects
checkpoints.description: A 3D rendered scene with three distinct geometric primitives against a dark background. There should be: (1) a sphere, (2) a box/cube, and (3) a torus (donut shape). The three objects should be spatially separated from each other — not overlapping or merged. Each object should have a different color: the sphere should be red/warm, the box should be green, and the torus should be blue. All three objects should be clearly visible and rendered with proper shading.
